title: Top 9 Herbal Tinctures for Reducing Fluid Retention Symptoms
description: Silybum marianum tincture is often used to help with fluid retention, which is when the body holds too much water, causing swelling and discomfort. This tincture is made from the seeds of the Silybum marianum plant, also known as milk thistle. It contains compounds that help to reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention. By reducing inflammation, the tincture may help to improve the body's ability to filter waste and excess fluids, which can help to reduce...
